security.csp: default-src 'self' data: blob:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://server.arcgisonline.com https://*.arcgisonline.com; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://server.arcgisonline.com https://*.arcgisonline.com

bundle.longDescription: A local desktop build of DroneRoute for planning DJI waypoint missions and exporting KMZ files.
